name: new-ip
description: New IP from scratch: Requirements → Full MAS authoring → RTL → TB → SIM → DOC

tasks.content: [MAS] Gather requirements: confirm module name, interface, key features
tasks.detail: Before writing the MAS, confirm with the user: (1) module name, (2) top-level ports and clock domains, (3) key features and operating modes, (4) register interface (APB / AXI-Lite / custom), (5) interrupt requirements, (6) any internal memory needs, (7) target clock frequency and pipeline requirements. Summarize in one paragraph and get approval before writing the MAS.

tasks.content: [MAS] Write §1 Overview and §2 Module Hierarchy + Interface
tasks.detail: Write §1: one-paragraph functional description (what it does, why it exists, key design goals). Write §2: instantiation tree, port table (name/width/direction/clock domain), parameters table. These define the external contract — get the interface right before writing internals.

Describe each feature/mode with trigger, datapath, control, output. Draw the FSM state table (state/next-state/condition/actions). For each FSM state: what triggers the transition, what outputs are driven. No ambiguous states — every transition must be specified.

§4: Register map with offset/name/width/access/reset. Bitfield detail for each register. §5: Interrupt source table (source/bit/type/enable-reg/status-reg/description), irq output logic, W1C clear mechanism. §6: Internal memory table (instance/type/depth/width/ports/latency). Fill all three sections or mark N/A explicitly.

tasks.content: [MAS] Write §7 Timing + §8 RTL Notes + §9 DV Plan
tasks.detail: §7: Clock freq, pipeline latency, CDC crossings. §8: Coding style (nonblocking FF, blocking comb, no latches), reset polarity, lint waivers. §9: Test sequence table S1-SN (sequence name/steps/expected result/priority), functional coverage goals, SVA assertions list. MAS is complete only when all 9 sections are filled.
Handoff to rtl_gen: Read <module>_mas.md fully. Implement: ports §2, FSM §3, registers §4, interrupt §5, memory §6. Follow §8 RTL Notes. Output: <module>.sv. Gate: 0 lint errors.

tasks.content: [TB] Generate testbench from MAS §9 DV Plan: tb_<module>.sv
tasks.detail: Handoff to tb_gen: Read MAS §9. Implement all S1-SN sequences. Add SVA assertions. Cover all interrupt flows and error injection cases. Output: tb_<module>.sv, tc_<module>.sv.
Run simulation. Fix bugs in RTL or TB. All S1-SN sequences must pass. Loop until 0 errors, 0 warnings.

tasks.content: [DOC] Generate documentation package for new IP
tasks.detail: Handoff to doc_gen. Produce: <module>_spec.md (integration spec), <module>_port_table.md, <module>_reg_map.md, <module>_integration_guide.md, <module>_dv_summary.md. Base on MAS + simulation results.
